## Description

A clear description of what the bug is.

## Steps to Reproduce

1. Go to '...'
2. Click on '...'
3. See error

## Expected Behavior

What you expected to happen.

## Actual Behavior

What actually happened.

## Environment

- **macOS version**: (e.g., 14.3 Sonoma)
- **QuietClaw version**: (e.g., 0.1.0)
- **Meeting platform**: (e.g., Google Meet, Zoom, Teams)
- **STT provider**: (e.g., Deepgram)

## Logs

If applicable, paste relevant logs from `~/Library/Logs/quietclaw/`.

## Screenshots

If applicable, add screenshots to help explain the problem.
